title: PIHOTEK
titleRomaji: PIHOTEK: Hokkyoku wo Kaze to Aruku
titleNative: PIHOTEK(ピヒュッティ) 北極を風と歩く
synopsis: A picture book written by Arctic adventurer Yasunaga Ogita and illustrated by Nana Inoue has been turned into a short animation. The entire film can be enjoyed about two minutes!

tags.name: Snowscape
tags.description: Prominently or partially set in a snowy environment.

title: Maebashi Witches
titleNative: 前橋ウィッチーズ
synonyms: มาเอบาชิวิชซ์
synopsis: Welcome to Maebashi City, Gunma Prefecture. For first-year high school student Yuina Akagi, her middling life takes a wild turn the moment a mysterious frog named Keroppe shows up and asks her, “Why don’t you become a witch?” Alongside Azu Niisato, Kyouka Kitahara, Choco Mitsumata, and Mai Kamiizumi, Yuina and her friends are excited to make people’s dreams come true as the Maebashi Witches. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Pa-Pa-Pa the ★ Movie: Perman - Tako de Pon! Ashi wa Pon!
titleRomaji: Pa-Pa-Pa the ★ Movie: Perman - Tako de Pon! Ashi wa Pon!
titleNative: Pa-Pa-Pa ザ★ムービー パーマン タコDEポン! アシHAポン!
synopsis: Dr. Octo who researches octopodes decides to take over the world as he deems the eight legged creatures a more suitable master species than humans. To do this, he takes an idol singer Sumire Hoshino (aka Perman #3) hostage. Mitsuo Suwa (aka Perman #1) likes the idol dearly (as he doesn't know the real identity of his Perman partner) and becomes so angry that he transforms to go rescue her. But fighting a giant octopus is more challenging than it looks! Screened simultaneously with Doraemon Movie 25: Nobita no Wan Nyan Jikuudeni and Doraemon Anniversary 25 .

title: Nepos Napos
titleNative: ネポス・ナポス
synopsis: You see a whale-shaped cloud drifting in the blue sky. What you don't see is a strange land of Nepos Napos that lies above it. Don't you want to know what is happening and how everybody lives up there? (Source: The Answer Studio)

title: Kotonakare Hero Gingerman

title: Bananya Around the World
titleNative: ばなにゃ あらうんど ざ わーるど
synopsis: Bananya returns! The mysterious cat who lives inside a banana is back for a new adventure when a ball of light appears. After the ball flashes, a new cat named Baby Sweet emerges. The two quickly become friends and set off on a grand adventure to discover new and exciting places around the world. Join the new friends on their journey! (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Dessert Catch! Teenieping
titleNative: 새콤달콤 캐치! 티니핑
synopsis: Puffping stole the Magic Sugar Ball! This has created a strange magical phenomenon where all the Dessert Teeniepings get sucked into a mirror which releases them on Earth for Romi to catch! Along with the Royal Dessert Teeniepings, Jellyping, Shashaping, and Fluffyping, Romi will have to accomplish her mission as fast as possible, otherwise, the Cake Castle will inevitably collapse!

title: Detectives These Days Are Crazy!
titleRomaji: Mattaku Saikin no Tantei to Kitara
titleNative: まったく最近の探偵ときたら
synopsis: Nagumo Keiichirou was a genius high-school detective. No case was complex enough for him. But what happens to genius detectives when they get older? Now 35, with bad hips, running a failing detective agency with no cases to solve and struggling to pay the rent, he's at a dead end. In comes a high school girl in his office who says she wants to work with him. With her help, will the out-of-touch, old-fashioned Nagumo get back the fire of his youth?

title: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season - A Cruel Fairy Tale: The Beautiful Princess
titleRomaji: Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season - Zankoku Douwa: Utsukushi-hime
titleEnglish: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season - A Cruel Fairy Tale: The Beautiful Princess
titleNative: 〈物語〉シリーズ オフ&モンスターシーズン 残酷童話 うつくし姫
synonyms: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season Episode 6.5
〈物語〉シリーズ オフ&モンスターシーズン EX
Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season - The Princess Beauty
synopsis: Episode 6.5 of Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season, adapting the short story "Utsukushi-hime/The Princess Beauty" Once upon a time, there was a true story that happened about 600 years ago. It's a story of a very beautiful girl who lived in a country that no longer exists. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Dream Animals THE MOVIE
titleNative: たべっ子どうぶつ THE MOVIE
synopsis: Dream Animals biscuits, a long-selling snack beloved by Japanese since its launch in 1978 has been sold in more than 20 countries around the world and features the animal names written in English on the biscuits. The product has enjoyed an explosion in popularity in recent years as merchandise, especially among young people. Now for the first time, the product is given treatment as an animated movie called Dream Animals: The Movie. How will these animal biscuit characters behave and sound as they embark upon a thrilling adventure while tugging at your heartstrings with endearingly rich personalities. (Source: TBS)

title: Kaiju No.8: Hoshina's Day Off
titleNative: 怪獣8号 保科の休日
synonyms: Kaiju No. 8: A Folga de Hoshina
synopsis: A special episode of Kaijuu 8-gou screened alongside the compilation movie. A day off... a rare day of peace for the Defense Force. After spending so long training, Reno has forgotten what he's supposed to do with free time. He sees that Hoshina is up to something with his own day off, and decides to go on a mission to tail him with Iharu! But then things go in an unexpected direction… (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Shounen

title: Poetics of the Garden
titleNative: 庭の詩学
synopsis: I try to remember what your hand felt like on my back when I was a child. And now I place my hand on yours, bent from pain. Like landscaped gardens are meant to evoke the four seasons and the cyclical wonders of nature, I gaze at you, hoping to find us one more time. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Before Dawn
titleNative: 薄明
synopsis: One cold and damp morning, two weasels were wandering the quiet streets. They get separated at one point but are reunited. Just then, bells and alarms began to ring through the city, and dawn came. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
